steps.title: Use the two equal outputs to find the structure
steps.content: The table gives $f(24)=-8$ and $f(30)=-8$. Any quadratic of the form $(x-24)(x-30)+c$ satisfies $f(24)=f(30)=c$. So we need $c=-8$, giving $f(x)=(x-24)(x-30)-8$.

steps.title: Verify with the third data point
steps.content:
Check $f(32)$ using $f(x)=(x-24)(x-30)-8$:
$$f(32)=(32-24)(32-30)-8=8\cdot2-8=8$$
This matches $f(32)=8$ from the table.

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• A: $f(x)=(x-24)(x-30)+4$ gives $f(24)=4 eq-8$. Eliminated.
  • B: $f(x)=(x-24)(x-30)-8$ gives $f(24)=-8$, $f(30)=-8$, $f(32)=8$. All match.
  • C: $f(x)=(x-8)(x-32)+32$ gives $f(24)=(16)(-8)+32=-96 eq-8$. Eliminated.
  • D: $f(x)=(x-8)(x-32)-32$ gives $f(24)=(16)(-8)-32=-160 eq-8$. Eliminated.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
